message:
feat(fcp-crypto): complete Crypto Primitives bead (1n78.5)

Implements comprehensive FCP2 cryptographic primitives:
- Ed25519 signing/verification with key ID derivation
- X25519 ECDH key exchange
- HKDF-SHA256 key derivation with FCP2-specific helpers
- ChaCha20-Poly1305 and XChaCha20-Poly1305 AEAD
- BLAKE3 keyed MAC for session frames
- HPKE (RFC 9180) sealed boxes for zone key distribution
- COSE_Sign1/CWT helpers for capability tokens
- Key ID (8-byte truncated BLAKE3) for key routing
- Signature canonicalization helpers

All 81 tests passing plus 3 doc tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+# Default to the FCP2 platform core crates (connectors are explicitly targeted).
+default-members = [
+    "crates/fcp-audit",
+    "crates/fcp-cbor",
+    "crates/fcp-core",
+    "crates/fcp-crypto",
+    "crates/fcp-manifest",
+    "crates/fcp-mesh",
+    "crates/fcp-protocol",
+    "crates/fcp-raptorq",
+    "crates/fcp-sandbox",
+    "crates/fcp-sdk",
+    "crates/fcp-store",
+    "crates/fcp-tailscale",
+    "crates/fcp-conformance",
+    "crates/fcp-cli",
+]

 [workspace.package]
 version = "0.1.0"
 edition = "2024"
@@ -31,6 +62,8 @@ futures-util = "0.3"
 # Serialization
 serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
 serde_json = "1.0"
+ciborium = "0.2.2"
+semver = { version = "1.0.27", features = ["serde"] }
 
 # Error handling
 thiserror = "2.0"
@@ -41,15 +74,26 @@ tracing = "0.1"
 tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["env-filter", "json"] }
 
 # Cryptography
-ed25519-dalek = { version = "2.1", features = ["rand_core"] }
+ed25519-dalek = { version = "2.1", features = ["rand_core", "zeroize"] }
+x25519-dalek = { version = "2.0", features = ["static_secrets", "zeroize"] }
+blake3 = "1.8.3"
+hkdf = "0.12"
+sha2 = "0.10"
+chacha20poly1305 = "0.10"
+hpke = "0.12"
+coset = "0.3"
+zeroize = { version = "1.8", features = ["derive"] }
+subtle = "2.6"
+rand = "0.8"
+rand_core = "0.6"
 
 # Identifiers
 uuid = { version = "1.11", features = ["v4", "serde"] }
 chrono = { version = "0.4", features = ["serde"] }
 
 # Bytes
 bytes = "1.9"
-hex = "0.4"
+hex = { version = "0.4", features = ["serde"] }
 
 # HTTP client
 reqwest = { version = "0.12", features = ["json", "rustls-tls"], default-features = false }

@@ -0,0 +1,61 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-crypto"
+description = "FCP2 crypto primitives and helpers"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+# Signatures
+ed25519-dalek.workspace = true
+
+# Key exchange
+x25519-dalek.workspace = true
+
+# Hashing
+blake3.workspace = true
+sha2.workspace = true
+
+# Key derivation
+hkdf.workspace = true
+
+# AEAD
+chacha20poly1305.workspace = true
+
+# HPKE (RFC 9180)
+hpke.workspace = true
+
+# COSE/CWT
+coset.workspace = true
+
+# Serialization (for COSE/CBOR)
+ciborium.workspace = true
+serde.workspace = true
+
+# Memory safety
+zeroize.workspace = true
+subtle.workspace = true
+
+# Randomness
+rand.workspace = true
+rand_core.workspace = true
+
+# Bytes
+bytes.workspace = true
+hex.workspace = true
+
+# Error handling
+thiserror.workspace = true
+
+# Time (for token validation)
+chrono.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+# Testing
+serde_json.workspace = true
